title: Please include tests in PyPI source distribution
body:
We would like to use the PyPI source distribution for downstream packaging in Gentoo to benefit from the signed attestations available there. However, we also need to be able to run the test suite as part of packaging. Could you please consider including the test files in the sdist? I can submit a PR if you agree.

See: https://packaging.python.org/en/latest/discussions/downstream-packaging/#provide-complete-source-distributions

comments.body: hey @mgorny thanks for the interest. please, go ahead and open a PR, and I'll review it
